ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio appearing in person for Carol Williams and Donald Donaldson (co-executors).
Steven Bovarnick appearing via zoom for Ronnie Donaldson (respondent).

The Court waives defective notice. Mrs. Fisher-Kouadio gives a breakdown of the funds. Petition for final distribution on waiver of account and for statutory commission and fee is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 21, 2009 is admitted to probate. Carol J. Williams and Donald R. Donaldson are appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: . Matter not reported.
